title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 82.690 - Coroner's inquest costs to be paid out of city treasury
text:
82.690.  Coroner's inquest costs to be paid out of city treasury. — All moneys required to be paid out of the county treasuries of the different counties of this state by section 58.570 shall, in the city of St. Louis, be paid out of the city treasury of said city.
(RSMo 1939 § 15743) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14795
